summary: First testing run for Smile Dental Clinic landing page. All backend endpoints working (5/5 pytest passed): POST/GET /api/appointments with validation, and POST /api/chat/stream SSE with Gemini 3 Flash streaming plus [DONE]. Frontend renders all sections and all appointment flows work end-to-end (create + service prefill). One critical UI issue: the AI chat floating button is covered by the 'Made with Emergent' badge overlay at bottom-right, so a real user click cannot open the chat panel (JS click works; chat itself is fully functional).

ui_bugs.issue: The #emergent-badge anchor (bottom-right 'Made with Emergent' badge) covers the AI chat toggle button. document.elementFromPoint at the button center returns the emergent-badge <a> element, so pointer clicks are intercepted and the chat panel never opens for real users. Only a synthetic JS .click() (which bypasses hit-testing) opens it.

action_items: Reposition or raise stacking context of ai-chat-toggle-button so it is not obscured by the Emergent badge. Options: move it to bottom-24 (or right-24) so it clears the badge, wrap it in a higher-z-index container, or offset horizontally (e.g., right side above badge). Same likely applies to ai-chat-panel bottom offset — verify the panel's close button and input remain reachable when the badge is present.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: 'logger' is used inside chat_stream exception handler but logging.getLogger is defined AFTER app.include_router — logger works because it's referenced at call-time, but the ordering is fragile. Move logger init to top of file.
server.py uses @app.on_event('shutdown') which is deprecated in FastAPI; consider lifespan handlers.
AppointmentDialog validates preferred_date only via HTML min=today; server accepts any string. Consider server-side date validation (>= today) to prevent bad data from non-browser clients.

success_rate.frontend: ~85% (chat toggle click blocked by badge overlay)

test_credentials: N/A - no auth in this app
seed_data_creation: Created a couple of TEST_ appointments via API and UI during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend fully green via pytest at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py. Chat SSE returns Gemini streamed text plus '[DONE]'. In the preview environment the 'Made with Emergent' badge overlaps the bottom-right chat toggle; test by verifying document.elementFromPoint at the button center returns the button (data-testid), not '#emergent-badge'. Note: today's date is 2026-07-06 so appointment date min-validation requires future dates.
rca of the issue: AI chat toggle uses fixed bottom-6 right-6 z-50. The Emergent preview injects '#emergent-badge' fixed at bottom-right with a higher effective stacking. Their bounding boxes overlap; hit-testing selects the badge. Fix by moving the chat button up (e.g., bottom-24) or increasing stacking via portal / higher z-index / offset horizontally.
